ValidationRule.description: Cant Add New Daily Report for Daily Summary Report if it has been Submitted or Invoiced
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: IF( AND(ISNEW(), OR(ISPICKVAL( Daily_Summary_Report__r.Status__c , "Submitted"),ISPICKVAL( Daily_Summary_Report__r.Status__c , "Approved")) ), true, false )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Cannot add new Daily Site Jobs for Daily Summary Reports that have been Submitted or Approved
